description: InPost provides parcel delivery and logistics services, including shipment creation, parcel tracking, pickup scheduling, returns, and parcel point lookup. Its public developer documentation covers APIs used by merchants and broker integrations across multiple markets.
summary: InPost exposes OAuth 2.1-protected REST APIs for account, location, shipping, pickups, returns, and tracking, plus a public MCP server at `https://mcp.inpost-group.com/mcp`.
